text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...So what's your bet? Is the card on the table
higher or lower than five?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Doesn't take much effort to figure out the answer is—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Nakayama, what fun are you getting
yourself into this time?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, princess. Don't tell me you're
looking to jump in?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. A bit of risk is the quickest route to
building mental fortitude. Please let me play too!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You just have to guess if the next card will be
higher or lower than this five card. So, which'll it
be?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
There are fewer numbers lower than five, so the
answer's pretty obvious.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sure about that, missy? It's a pretty risky choice.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm fine! If you don't take high risks, you
won't get high returns.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Haha. You've got guts. All right, you two.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Care to play on till there's a clear winner?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The card on the table is revealed to be a four! As
if by a miracle, all three of them have made the
right choice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a legend unfolds at lunchtime, marking
the beginning of the Risk-Takers' Den!
